## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes a defect)
- [ ] New feature (stdlib addition, tooling, documentation)
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Refactoring (no behaviour change)
- [ ] Breaking change (requires ADR)

## Evidence

If this adds a stdlib function, list the requesting applications.

## Verification

- [ ] `python -m pytest` passes
- [ ] `black --check .` passes
- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `mypy` passes
- [ ] New code has tests
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] No breaking changes without ADR

## Related Issues

Closes #...
